name: Bank Transactions Connector - Europe (PSD2)
description: Connect to European bank accounts via PSD2 Open Banking. Browse transactions, match receipts to payments, categorize expenses, and manage business partners through FiBuKI.com. 25 tools.

channel.blurb: Connect to European bank accounts via PSD2 — browse transactions, match receipts, categorize expenses

apiKey.description: Your FiBuKI API key. Generate at fibuki.com > Settings > Integrations > AI Agents, or run: npx @fibukiapp/cli auth
